notes:
vMLX 1.6.2

First public 1.6 release — the full vendored-VLM + continuous-batching line, now stabilized and validated across the model family.

Highlights:
- Vendored vision/video runtime: vMLX now owns the Qwen 3.5 / 3.6 and Gemma 4 VLM paths (and Ornith), so image + video turns no longer depend on external VLM code drift. Affine-JANG Qwen VL bundles are routed to the VLM path correctly.
- openPangu-2.0-Flash: full engine integration — vendored runtime + autodetect, native <|tool_call_start|> JSON-list tool parser, thinking On/Off/Auto mapping, MLA prefill fix, and an honest reasoning-budget backstop (no forced token ceilings).
- Continuous-batching multi-client stability: fixed engine aborts under concurrent clients, the Zaya CCA concurrency crash, the Gemma-4 concurrent token-loop collapse, and the openPangu cache-filter crash. Multi-client + multiturn now hold coherently.
- Gemma-4 prefix-cache correctness: RotatingKVCache is isolate-cloned on fetch, so repeated same-prompt turns no longer diverge or drop tool calls after cache reuse.
- Quant-coherence regressions fixed: the Qwen 3.5 +1 RMSNorm shift is now gated to the Qwen family only, restoring coherent output for MiniMax-M2.7 and DeepSeek-V4-Flash (both previously collapsed to a single repeated token).
- Tool-calling parsers hardened: Qwen tolerates attribute-form function/parameter tags; Step-3.7 emits <args><name>value</name> arguments and is now parsed into structured tool_calls; streaming tool_calls carry consistent ids and end the turn with finish_reason=tool_calls.
- Honest reasoning budgets: the resolved max_tokens is enforced across the answer pass and cache-error restarts (no runaway, no injected stop tokens).
- Cache defaults: paged cache defaults OFF for standard families (structural/hybrid families keep it internally by design); prefix + SSD block cache on.
- Native MTP depth-3 speculative decoding for Qwen CRACK-MTP bundles.
- Compatibility with transformers >= 5.13.

Verification:
- Live cross-model matrix (external-drive JANG/MXFP4 bundles, Apple Silicon): Gemma-4 (JANG + MXFP4), Qwen3.6-35B MXFP4 native-MTP depth 3, Step-3.7-Flash, Nemotron-Omni (including real audio transcription), and LFM2.5-8B — validated across text, reasoning On/Off/Auto, tool calls in every reasoning mode, vision, audio, multiturn recall, the Ollama + Anthropic gateways, and live generation-config controls in the Chat settings. Every turn read for coherence, looping, and reasoning/tool leakage.
- No test regressions attributable to the release changes.
- DMG is Developer ID signed (team 55KGF2S5AY), Apple notarized, stapled, and Gatekeeper accepted; runs on macOS Sequoia and Tahoe (Apple Silicon).
